schema_fit_assessment.summary: Top-level SkillPackage structure is subject-neutral, but production English needs schema question-type extensions, English visual renderers, and writing response/rubric validation before package creation.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Build print-concept readiness by identifying uppercase and lowercase letters and connecting common graphemes to common letter sounds.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Uppercase Letters
level_banks_design.focus: Identify named uppercase letters from letter cards.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Lowercase Letters
level_banks_design.focus: Identify named lowercase letters from letter cards.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Letter Sounds
level_banks_design.focus: Choose or say the common sound for a target letter.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Match Letter to Sound
level_banks_design.focus: Match printed letters to a spoken/common sound cue.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave uppercase, lowercase, sound, and match tasks.

acceptance_criteria: SkillPackage includes required top-level metadata, lesson fields, worked examples, hint ladder, guided practice, adaptive question bank, checkpoint, misconception bank, review bank, game theme, next/remediation skill IDs, and level banks.
Guided Mission renders Story, Lesson, Watch, Demo, Practice, Challenge, Checkpoint, Badge, and Profile without placeholder copy.
Skill Practice Center includes four focused levels plus Mixed; each level contains 10–12 production questions aligned to its focus.
Every question includes a supported question type, prompt, answer or rubric data, visual model where useful, hints/feedback, and misconception tag.
Package is added to the Skill World manifest/hub source so learners discover it through manifest data rather than hardcoded placeholders.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.skill_title: Phonemic Awareness: Beginning, Middle, Ending Sounds
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Develop oral sound awareness by hearing and identifying sound positions in spoken CVC and familiar one-syllable words.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Beginning Sounds
level_banks_design.focus: Identify the first sound in spoken/pictured words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Ending Sounds
level_banks_design.focus: Identify the final sound in spoken/pictured words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Middle Vowel Sounds
level_banks_design.focus: Identify the medial short vowel sound in simple words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Same/Different Sounds
level_banks_design.focus: Compare words for same or different beginning, middle, or ending sounds.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave beginning, middle, ending, and compare-sound tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Connect phonemic awareness to decoding by blending consonant-vowel-consonant words with short vowel patterns.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Short A CVC
level_banks_design.focus: Blend and read short-a CVC words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Short I/O CVC
level_banks_design.focus: Blend and read short-i and short-o CVC words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Short E/U CVC
level_banks_design.focus: Blend and read short-e and short-u CVC words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Mixed CVC Blending
level_banks_design.focus: Blend across all five short vowels.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave decoding, picture match, and word-building CVC tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Strengthen onset-rime decoding and spelling transfer by reading and building common short-vowel word families.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: -at / -an Families
level_banks_design.focus: Read, sort, and build -at and -an family words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: -it / -ig Families
level_banks_design.focus: Read, sort, and build -it and -ig family words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: -op / -ot Families
level_banks_design.focus: Read, sort, and build -op and -ot family words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Mixed Word Families
level_banks_design.focus: Compare and decode across taught word families.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave sort, rhyme, build, and read tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Build automatic recognition of common Grade 1 words, especially irregular/function words needed for sentence fluency.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Set A Sight Words
level_banks_design.focus: Recognize first high-frequency word set in isolation.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Set B Sight Words
level_banks_design.focus: Recognize second high-frequency word set in isolation.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Match Word to Sentence
level_banks_design.focus: Choose the sight word that completes a sentence.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Read Phrase Fluently
level_banks_design.focus: Read short phrases containing taught sight words.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave word recognition, sentence cloze, and phrase tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Support accurate, meaningful reading of simple sentences with attention to word order, small words, and punctuation.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Read Simple Sentences
level_banks_design.focus: Read decodable/simple sentences accurately.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Match Sentence to Picture
level_banks_design.focus: Match sentence meaning to a picture.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Complete the Sentence
level_banks_design.focus: Choose a missing word that makes sense.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Read with Punctuation
level_banks_design.focus: Use period, question mark, and exclamation mark cues.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave read, match, complete, and punctuation tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Develop basic literal comprehension by locating people/characters, actions/things, and places in a short text or picture story.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Who Questions
level_banks_design.focus: Answer who questions from pictures and short texts.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: What Questions
level_banks_design.focus: Answer what happened/what is it questions.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Where Questions
level_banks_design.focus: Answer where questions from explicit details.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Mixed Detail Questions
level_banks_design.focus: Distinguish who, what, and where questions.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave picture-story and short-passage detail questions.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Build retell and narrative structure by identifying and ordering beginning, middle, and ending events.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Beginning
level_banks_design.focus: Identify what happens first.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Middle
level_banks_design.focus: Identify the middle/main event after the beginning.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: End
level_banks_design.focus: Identify how the story ends.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Put Events in Order
level_banks_design.focus: Order three story events.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave B/M/E identification and event-ordering tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Produce complete simple sentences with capitalization, word spacing, and end punctuation.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Capital Letters
level_banks_design.focus: Identify and fix sentence-start capitals.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Word Spacing
level_banks_design.focus: Identify and fix spacing between words.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: End Punctuation
level_banks_design.focus: Choose or add correct end punctuation.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Complete Sentence
level_banks_design.focus: Build or write a complete sentence.

level_banks_design.focus: Interleave capitalization, spacing, punctuation, and complete-sentence tasks.

work_items.subject: English
work_items.skill_title: Describe a Picture with a Sentence
work_items.standards_gap_learning_purpose: Generate a meaningful sentence about a picture by naming the subject, adding an action, and including a concrete detail.
work_items.recommended_action: Create a production SkillPackage JSON with full Guided Mission, Skill Practice Center level banks, misconception bank, review bank, and manifest entry.

level_banks_design.label: Level 1: Name the Picture
level_banks_design.focus: Name the main person, animal, object, or place.

level_banks_design.label: Level 2: Add an Action
level_banks_design.focus: Add what the subject is doing.

level_banks_design.label: Level 3: Add a Detail
level_banks_design.focus: Add color, place, size, feeling, or other observable detail.

level_banks_design.label: Level 4: Write a Full Sentence
level_banks_design.focus: Write a full sentence about the picture.

level_banks_design.label: Mixed
level_banks_design.focus: Interleave naming, action, detail, and full-sentence writing tasks.
